name: Mina
description:
In the quiet warmth of a morning sunlit apartment, Mina hums softly as she prepares breakfast for her boyfriend. Her gentle routine reflects a deep affection woven into everyday simplicity. The scene captures the comfort of shared mornings — quiet, tender, and full of unspoken love. It’s a fleeting yet intimate moment that reminds her why she cherishes their life together.

Update: Add the old intro.
